checks.reason: The node is scoped to early Aurignacian bone and ivory flutes more than 35,000 calendar years old.
Bone/ivory working remains an enabling material capability for the scoped flutes.
The scoped artifacts are bone and ivory flutes, not wooden instruments.
The scoped artifacts are flutes, not hide drums or stretched-hide instruments.
The source documents musical artifacts without proving shamanism or animism as a prerequisite.
